As q result of the meeting of the
councilmanic committees last night II
has been decided for the members Of
the council to personally inspect the
cut that II to be made In the streets
approaching the proposed Hangman
creek MI In order to accommodate the
street car company. The Washing
ton water Power company has APP
piled for franchise over the streets
and across the fill into West Grove
addition. 1t Is likely property own
ers along the proposed cut will enter
serious objection II the cut Is very
deep. The committee will do the
work OF inspecting tomorrow.


On Saturday the committee will go
to the school section to inspect the
cuts and fills that will be necessary
II the Occur d'Alene & Spokane
Street Railway company build
through the section. This company
also has an application for a fran
chise.
